text: Inception is a 2010 science fiction film directed by Christopher Nolan. The film explores dreams within dreams. Hans Zimmer composed the score.
Interstellar is a 2014 science fiction film also directed by Christopher Nolan. It features space exploration and time dilation. Hans Zimmer composed the score.
The Dark Knight is a 2008 action film directed by Christopher Nolan. It features Batman and the Joker. Hans Zimmer composed the score.
